allow: WebFetch(domain:langfuse.com)
WebFetch(domain:raw.githubusercontent.com)

Bash(ssh root@192.168.1.203 "mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/open-webui-vault"
cat << 'COMPOSE' | ssh root@192.168.1.203 "cat > /mnt/user/appdata/open-webui-vault/docker-compose.yml"
services:
  open-webui:
    image: ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
    container_name: vault-open-webui
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3090:8080"
    volumes:
      - open-webui-data:/app/backend/data
    environment:
      - OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=http://192.168.1.203:4000/v1
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=<ATHANOR_LITELLM_API_KEY>
      - WEBUI_AUTH=false
      - ENABLE_OLLAMA_API=false
      - RAG_EMBEDDING_ENGINE=openai
      - RAG_OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=http://192.168.1.203:4000/v1
      - RAG_OPENAI_API_KEY=<ATHANOR_LITELLM_API_KEY>
      - TZ=America/Chicago
    extra_hosts:
      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"

volumes:
  open-webui-data:
COMPOSE
echo "Open WebUI compose deployed")

Bash(which happy 2>/dev/null; npm list -g 2>/dev/null | grep -i happy; pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i happy; ls ~/.claude/plugins/ 2>/dev/null)
Bash(ps aux | grep -i happy | grep -v grep; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -i happy)
Bash(happy --help 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(happy doctor 2>&1 | head -40)
Bash(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E "177349|177356|happy" ; netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep node | head -10)

Bash(happy -p "Call the mcp__happy__change_title tool to set the title to 'MCP Server Test'. If the tool is not available, say exactly 'TOOL_UNAVAILABLE'. If it succeeds, say exactly 'TOOL_SUCCESS'." 2>/dev/null)
Bash(unset CLAUDECODE && happy -p "Say exactly: HELLO_TEST" 2>&1)
Bash(env -u CLAUDECODE happy -p "Say exactly one word: HELLO" 2>&1)
Read(//usr/lib/node_modules/happy-coder/**)
Bash(node -e ":*)
Bash(sudo sed -i 's|sessionIdGenerator: void 0|sessionIdGenerator: \(\) => randomUUID\(\)|' /usr/lib/node_modules/happy-coder/dist/index-B3gQr6vs.mjs)

Bash(sudo sed -i 's|sessionIdGenerator: void 0|sessionIdGenerator: \(\) => randomUUID\(\)|' /usr/lib/node_modules/happy-coder/dist/index-jN3TrweZ.cjs && grep "randomUUID" /usr/lib/node_modules/happy-coder/dist/index-jN3TrweZ.cjs | head -3)
Bash(sudo sed -i 's|sessionIdGenerator: \(\) => randomUUID\(\)|sessionIdGenerator: \(\) => node_crypto.randomUUID\(\)|' /usr/lib/node_modules/happy-coder/dist/index-jN3TrweZ.cjs)

Bash(sudo sed -i 's/if \(this._initialized && this.sessionId !== undefined\) {/if \(this._initialized \\&\\& this.sessionId !== undefined \\&\\& req.headers.get\("mcp-session-id"\) === this.sessionId\) {/' /usr/lib/node_modules/happy-coder/node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/dist/esm/server/webStandardStreamableHttp.js)
